texto: The degree of liberty or tyranny in any government is in large degree a reflection of the relative determination of the subjects to be free and their willingness and ability to resist efforts to enslave them.

texto: As Charles Stewart Parnell called out during the Irish rent strike campaign in 1879 and 1880:It is no use relying on the Government . . . . You must only rely upon your own determination . . . . Help yourselves by standing together . . . strengthen those amongst yourselves who are weak . . . , band yourselves together, organize yourselves . . . and you must win . . . When you have made this question ripe for settlement,then and not till then will it be settled.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Gene Sharp sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “As Charles Stewart Parnell called out during the Irish rent strike campaign in 1879 and 1880:It i…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a coragem, charles-stewart-parnell, encouragement, útil em momentos de encouragement.

texto: The fall of one regime does not bring in a utopia. Rather, it opens the way for hard work and long efforts to build more just social, economic,and political relationships and the eradication of other forms of injustices and oppression.
